description: Medium-sized warbler moving thru low brush. Back and wings were greenish. The bird had a mousey-gray "hood," which included head, nape, and chest, excepting smudgy black on lower end of bib (ie, chest) and diffuse blackish lores (not as dark/well-defined as MacG) bleeding into immediately adjacent parts of face. Underparts bright yellow with limited greenish wash on sides. Undertail coverts long compared to tail -- longer than that seen on MacGillivray's Warbler. No white around eye at all. No wingbars. Bill moderately hefty for a warbler (c/w Mourning/MacG). Leg and bill color not noted.
